name: ATLANTIC AMERICAN CORP
business: Atlantic American Corporation is an insurance holding company that operates through its subsidiaries in property and casualty insurance (commercial automobile, general liability, surety bonds) and life and health insurance (life insurance, Medicare supplement, accident and health products). The property and casualty segment provides tailored commercial automobile coverage to state governments, local municipalities, and large motor pools. The life and health segment offers Medicare supplement and other accident and health insurance to individuals and groups through independent agents.

exposures.sentence: Atlantic American Corporation, a Georgia corporation incorporated in 1968 (the Parent or Company ), is a holding company that operates through its subsidiaries in well-defined specialty markets within the life and health and property and casualty insurance industries.
